'''pawïfsïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadblock|roadblock]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-w-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadblock|roadblock]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| pawïfsïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || pæwïfsïfth || pæwïfsïfj || pæwïfsïfsh || pæwïfsïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || pawïfwïfsïfth || pawïfwïfsïfj || pawïfwïfsïfsh || pawïfwïfsïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || pawïfsïfth || pawïfsïfj || pawïfsïfsh || pawïfsïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || pawïffsïffth || pawïffsïffj || pawïffsïffsh || pawïffsïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || pawïfsïfïf || pawïfsïfïf || pawïfsïfïf || pawïfsïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || pawïfsïfth || pawïfsïfj || pawïfsïfsh || pawïfsïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || pawïfsïfïfl || pawïfsïfïfl || pawïfsïfïfl || pawïfsïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || pawïfsïfïfïf || pawïfsïfïfïf || pawïfsïfïfïf || pawïfsïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || pawïfsïfïfn || pawïfsïfïfn || pawïfsïfïfn || pawïfsïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || pawïfsïfïforo || pawïfsïfïforo || pawïfsïfïforo || pawïfsïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words a3ddb2a]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d34c0b6}}
